title: Good: EUI-64 derivation via SHA-256 hash
description: lora_l2.c:generate_eui64() hashes the full hardware ID through SHA-256 rather than directly using hwid bytes. This avoids MCU-specific layout issues (STM32's 12-byte UID has shared lot/wafer bytes) and distributes entropy uniformly. The comment explains the rationale well.
close_reason: Positive review observation recorded; no implementation action required.
